markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content production, performance, and introduce a new AI tracking tool.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance at New Highs:** Sessions and Knowledge Center traffic are hitting new all-time highs, driven by the December publishing unlock.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [**New AI Tracking Tool:** GrowthX introduced "Check That," a new tool replacing Scrunch. It provides more precise data by tracking high-intent prompts and showing exact citation URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [**Content Backlog:** A backlog of 300+ articles is ready for review. Angel will now publish B2C content and clear the queue, which is expected to boost Dental B2B/B2C traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**Vivek's Departure:** This was Vivek's final meeting. Carrie will be the sole GrowthX contact moving forward.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review

  - [**Overall Traffic:** Sessions and Knowledge Center traffic are at new all-time highs.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
      - [January traffic is already ahead of December with one week remaining.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [**Non-Branded Impressions:** Increasing month-over-month.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Trend:** Impressions are down since Google limited bot traffic, but click-through rates are up → higher-quality traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [**Content Pillar Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
      - **\#1:** Automotive
      - **\#2:** Dental Tips (B2C)
      - **\#3:** Dental B2B (fewer articles published)
  - [**LLM Referral Traffic:** Down in January vs. December.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** Users now trust LLM answers more and click through to sources less often.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
      - [**Note:** This metric only tracks direct clicks, not overall AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### Content Production & Workflow

  - [**Status:** 300+ articles are ready for review, with 10 new articles delivered daily via webhook.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** Carrie created an Airtable interface to simplify publishing status updates.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [**Action:** Angel will use the interface to update status to "Published" and add the live URL.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a cleaner, more focused view than navigating the full Airtable base.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### New AI Visibility Tool: "Check That"

  - [**Purpose:** Replaces Scrunch for AI visibility reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [**Key Differentiators:**](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**Data Focus:** Tracks high-intent, "evaluation stage" prompts (e.g., "companies that provide quick approval for financing for dental expenses"), not broad keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**Citation Details:** Shows the exact page URL cited in an LLM response, enabling analysis of which content is most effective.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
      - [**Prompt Library:** Includes a library of maintained prompts that do not count against custom prompt limits.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [**Access & Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [Sunbit receives 12 months of free access for feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
      - [At renewal, access becomes a separate, optional line item.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Angel:**](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [Begin publishing B2C articles.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
      - [Use the new Airtable interface to update publishing status and add live URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
      - [Clear the content backlog, starting with legal reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
      - [Share the link to the new Airtable publishing interface.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Manage all GrowthX communications as the sole point of contact.](https://fathom.video/share/R4ZDQYYHE4JdCQ-3yLtT1rxtc2Dsj5B8?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)
